chunks.title: Decision: Is the user a customer?
chunks.content: Is the user a customer? If yes, proceed to the next step. Otherwise, ask for payment information.

chunks.title: Flow: Payment Information
chunks.content: Ask for payment information. If the user provides valid payment information, proceed to the next step. Otherwise, display an error message.

chunks.title: Criteria: Valid Payment Information
chunks.content: Check if the payment information is valid. If yes, proceed to the next step. Otherwise, ask for payment information again.

chunks.title: Error Message
chunks.content: Display an error message to the user. Ask for payment information again if the user wants to try again.
